emails.subject: Tenaska IV
emails.body: Darren: Please change the demand fees on deal 384258 for Tenaska IV to the numbers below. Thanks. 6/01 from 3,559,472.93 to 3,541,521.53 8/01 from 4,116,036.00 to 4,117,198.00

emails.subject: Tenaska IV
emails.body: Darren: I have some updates for Tenaska IV. Let me know if you have any questions. Prod. Deal Change 11/00 529856 change $407,547.02 to $540,089.00 (to pay Tenaska IV for intercompany sale) 9/01 384258 change $2,861,611.00 to $2,846,818.24 (adjust for actual tport) 10/01 384258 zero out price, add demand fee for $3,216,762.50 Thanks, Megan

emails.subject: Tenaska IV
